title: Daily Briefing — Monday, June 1
tldr: Model-launch and IPO headlines, condensed. Jun 1 was a new open-weight model with big benchmark claims and an IPO filing — news, not a play.

The one durable habit it points at — never trust a vendor benchmark until it reproduces on your own tasks — is built into the eval kit (Jun 5) and the standing eval set (May 18), so it isn't repeated here.

blocks.p: A launch with pre-release benchmark claims is a hypothesis, not a result. The runnable response is to have your own eval set ready (see May 18) and run it the day weights land (see Jun 5) — there's no separate do-it-today move on this date.

sources: No standalone play survived re-grading; see the eval-kit entries (May 18, Jun 5) for the durable habit this day pointed at.
